betOfDay.analysis: The line is locked at -13.5 across FanDuel, DraftKings, and BetMGM — zero movement, which means sharp money is on the Clippers. Sacramento is struggling and historically bad against physical home teams. LA at the Intuit Dome is one of the best home-court advantages in the West. Lay the points.

picks.reasoning: Line perfectly locked at -13.5 across all three major books — no movement means sharpest money agrees. Kings have been one of the worst road teams in the West. Clippers at home are dominant. Best number on this slate.

Jokic and the Nuggets are the better team, even on the road. Lakers have been inconsistent at home this season. DraftKings and BetMGM locked at -1.5. Small spread but Nuggets are clearly the superior squad and should handle business.

Line locked at -4.5 across all three books. Heat at home in Miami are a reliable cover team — the crowd and culture matter. Magic are inconsistent on the road. Straightforward home-team lean with solid line consensus.

Golden Knights are one of the most dominant home teams in the NHL. Blackhawks are in full rebuild mode and one of the worst road teams in the league. Line locked at -225 to -230 across books. Back the better team at home.

research.nba: Saturday slate — 9 NBA games. Celtics vs Wizards already in progress at 6 PM MT. Key tonight: Heat vs Magic (6:10 PM), Nuggets @ Lakers (6:40 PM), Clippers vs Kings (8:40 PM). Sunday has OKC vs Minnesota and Cavs vs Dallas as big matchups.
research.nhl: Big NHL Saturday with 16 games. Several already underway at 6 PM MT. Best play: Golden Knights at home vs Blackhawks (8 PM MT). Also watching Oilers vs Predators and Minnesota vs Toronto for Sunday card.
